response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched video to identify song. 2. Identified '管制塔より' by Hakui Koyori, composed by Shota Horie. 3. Searched for lyrics using Japanese title and composer. 4. Found full lyrics. 5. Mapped scenes chronologically. 6. Constructed final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song '管制塔より' (Kanseitou yori) by VTuber Hakui Koyori, followed by an animated music video for the same song, and concludes with a post-performance talk segment.

scenes.description: Introductory segment with the stage and performer setting up for the performance.
Live vocal performance of '管制塔より'. The performer sings while dancing on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔 砂嵐の向こうへ 祈るように綴った これからのこと ラジオネーム 匿名希望 お便り 届いていますか この世界がいつからか まるで他人事のように やけに静かなので 不安になったのです 思い出したのです 人知れず口を噤んだまま 終われないのです それは嫌なのです 夢ってもっと わがままだったでしょう 応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ 此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな 誰にも届かない光を どうしたら、伝えられるのでしょう どうしても、伝えたいよ ラジオネーム 匿名希望

意気地無しなのでしょうか それともこの世界には ぼくはお邪魔でしょうか だとしても綴るよ みっともなく叫ぶよ フラれたって好きだよ いいでしょ いいでしょ

楽しかったよね 悔しかったよね もう独り言は、嫌だ 「待たせちゃったかな」「別に待ってないよ」 夢と呼んだそれもぼくだっただけ もういいかい

応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ 此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな 誰にも届かない光を ぼくだけは 光と呼び続ける 真夜中 管制塔から あなたを明かしてやる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Faint lights at the control tower, toward the sandstorm, I wrote down what I'm praying for about what's to come. Radio name, Anonymous. Are you receiving my message? Since when did this world start feeling like someone else's business? It's strangely quiet, so I became anxious. I remembered that I can't end this while keeping my mouth shut in secret. I don't want that. Dreams were supposed to be more selfish, right? Answer me, smile at me, notice me. I'm right here, you're so mean. How can I convey this light that reaches no one? No matter what, I want to convey it. Radio name, Anonymous.

Am I just a coward? Or am I just a nuisance to this world? Even so, I'll write. I'll scream ungracefully. Even if I'm rejected, I love you, is that okay? Is it?

It was fun, wasn't it? It was frustrating, wasn't it? I don't want to talk to myself anymore. "Did I keep you waiting?" "I'm not waiting at all." It was just me who called it a dream. Are you ready?

Answer me, smile at me, notice me. I'm right here, you're so mean. How can I convey this light that reaches no one? Only I will keep calling it light. In the middle of the night, from the control tower, I will illuminate you.

scenes.description: Animated music video for '管制塔より'. The song continues.

scenes.description: Talk segment post-performance. Performer talks about the song and future plans.
